raw_response: The greatest movement is characteristic of diarthrotic joints because they possess full mobility compared to the partial mobility of amphiarthrotic joints and lack of mobility in synarthrotic joints. Therefore, \boxed{B} should be selected. Based on the definitions and descriptions given, diarthrodial joints (\boxed{B}) exhibit the greatest range of motion as opposed to the slight movement permitted by amphiarthrodial joints (\boxed{A}) and the absence of movement in synarthrodial joints (\boxed{C}).
